channel.title: GitHub CMake Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CMake in GitHub

item.title: microsoft/vcpkg
item.description: C++ Library Manager for Windows, Linux, and MacOS

item.title: cpm-cmake/CPM.cmake
item.description: 📦 CMake's missing package manager. A small CMake script for setup-free, cross-platform, reproducible dependency management.

item.title: corrosion-rs/corrosion
item.description: Marrying Rust and CMake - Easy Rust and C/C++ Integration!

item.title: abdes/cryptopp-cmake
item.description: A modern CMake build project for Crypto++ (https://github.com/weidai11/cryptopp).

item.title: leetal/ios-cmake
item.description: A CMake toolchain file for iOS/iPadOS, visionOS, macOS, watchOS & tvOS C/C++/Obj-C++ development

item.title: TheLartians/PackageProject.cmake
item.description: 🏛️ Help other developers use your project. A CMake script for packaging C/C++ projects for simple project installation while employing best-practices for maximum compatibility.

item.title: flathub/shared-modules
item.description: Common Flatpak modules that can be used as a git submodule
